semantic.role: Document describing the system vision and module orchestration of the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Outlines the core vision of the ArchSpine system for maintaining mirrored documentation across languages
Describes how modules orchestrate to keep language-specific documentation in sync
Explains the role of the spine (central source of truth) and atlas (language-specific mirrors)
outOfScope: Does not cover specific implementation details or configuration of individual modules
Does not include user-facing installation or usage instructions

English.purpose: To provide a high-level overview of the ArchSpine system's vision and how its modules interact to maintain mirrored documentation across languages.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for architects, developers, and documentarians who need to understand the overall design and rationale behind the ArchSpine mirror system. It explains why the system exists (to solve multi-language documentation drift) and who benefits from it.
key_takeaways: ArchSpine is a mirror system that synchronizes documentation across languages from a central spine
The system vision emphasizes reducing translation drift and maintaining consistency
Module orchestration defines how the spine and atlas components interact

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 提供ArchSpine系统的高层概览，阐述其核心愿景以及各模块如何协同工作以维护多语言文档镜像。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向需要理解ArchSpine镜像系统整体设计与原理的架构师、开发者和文档维护人员。它解释了系统存在的原因（解决多语言文档偏离问题）以及目标受众。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine是一个镜像系统，通过中心脊柱同步多语言文档
系统愿景强调减少翻译漂移并保持一致性
模块编排定义了脊柱和地图集组件之间的交互
